parameters.apprise_url_plus: azure://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.source_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.tenant_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Office 365 destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise azure:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

client_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Office 365 client id

secret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Office 365 secret

source_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Office 365 source

tenant_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Office 365 tenant
